whatWasImplemented: <Toaster /> mounted once in src/app/layout.tsx with position='top-right', richColors, closeButton, and custom classNames pulling from app CSS tokens so the toast chrome matches the rest of the app.

src/lib/toast.ts — thin wrapper exporting toast.success / toast.error / toast.loading / toast.dismiss with a 4000ms default duration. Settings save, billing actions, and future file-upload / responses / escalation features consume this single import.
Wired first caller: handleSave in site/site-client.tsx now calls toast.success('Saved') on success and toast.error on failure.
src/__tests__/toast-wrapper.test.ts — 5 unit tests verifying the wrapper forwards correctly with the configured defaults. sonner itself is mocked.
whatWasLeftUndone: Visual theme match confirmation needs a browser screenshot (VAL-SET-006 tool: Playwright). Token wiring done via classNames.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 343 passed / 1 skipped / 49 files (+5 new).
